Control Tower
ATL Region · Key Total = OOD + 195

ATL Region Overview

Key inactive view: recovered/closed records are excluded. Total Key Inactive only counts Out of Delivery (200 / 202 / 211 / 220 / 231 / 232) + 195 Linehaul Inac. 199 and 255 are kept as reference metrics on Overview only and are not included in the total. Upload or paste updated package numbers to remove records that already received new system updates.

Weekly Historical Analysis

Upload up to 7 inactive Excel snapshots. The dashboard will compare Total Key Inactive, 195, and 200+ OOD by report date. Dates are inferred from the filename first, then from file modified time.

Historical files only render in this section, so the current dashboard stays lightweight.

City Historical Trends

Each city shows two curves: 195 and 200+ OOD. Node values are displayed directly on each point.

Remove Updated Packages

Paste tracking numbers / order IDs that already updated after the inactive report was generated. One per line, or separated by spaces/commas.

Operational Notes

Use the 195 trend for satellite linehaul inactive monitoring and the 200+ trend for OOD/DSP delivery-chain monitoring. Reference statuses 199 and 255 remain excluded from Total Key Inactive.
